changelog: Fixed: chunk size mismatch error during downloads — temp files now isolated per download in a hidden folder
Fixed: cancelled/paused download showed 0% progress in UI instead of actual progress
Fixed: speed display showing unrealistic values (e.g. 1.5 GB/s) at download start
Fixed: speed limit settings panel showed 0 after reopening when limit was under 1 MB/s
Fixed: per-job speed limit dialog did not apply to already-running download
Fixed: Reset to Defaults button in settings did nothing (confirmation dialog was never rendered)
Fixed: RFC 5987 filename decoding, redirect probe fallback, URL expiry handling
Added: UA rotation — automatically retries with a fresh User-Agent on 429/403 errors (up to 3 attempts)
Added: startup dialog prompts user to close browsers before replacing locked native host binary
